title: When Evangelion 30 comes out in Japan
display_title: When Evangelion 30 comes out in Japan
wikitext:
[]: When Evangelion 3.0 comes out in Japan             Quote Post by fadadio » Thu Mar 22, 2012 3:43 am will you avoid this forum like the plague until you see it? or search for any and all spoilers? I for one will forsake this place until I have seen it myself

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 3:50 am I will see it as soon I can, non illegally of course. I will avoid this forum area, however, 3.0 will be a top priority spoiler for a while, so maybe this area will be safe.

[]:             Quote Post by Koishiro » Thu Mar 22, 2012 6:27 am Dude... I don't know if I will resist the spoilers. But at least i want to knows the movie reception, until I watch it. :)

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 7:28 am I will avoid the Rebuild forums, but certainly not Evageeks as a whole. I trust people here to have enough restraint and not let it spill into the other boards.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Thu Mar 22, 2012 7:32 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Mar 22, 2012 7:42 am I'd love to avoid anything related to 3.0 until the Blu-rei is out to enjoy it in its full glory but given the nature of regularly browsing 4chan it will be really hard to not get spoiled somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Thu Mar 22, 2012 8:27 am I don’t really care if I get spoiled the only part of Eva that was not spoiled for me was 2.22. I really don’t mind being spoiled.

[]:             Quote Post by Lorkhan » Thu Mar 22, 2012 10:06 am I will attempt to steer clear from spoilers for as long as humanly possible, but being me I'll probably shoot myself in the foot and wind up reading em anyway. Alas.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Mar 22, 2012 10:45 am This time I will succeed knowing nothing until I' see it myself, although it's going to be hard avoiding everything for like 3/4 year... But the payoff shall be orgasmic.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Mar 22, 2012 12:07 pm I will avoid at least the "Rebuild" section of this forum. Not because of spoiler (for NME I prefer spoilers) but I think I will suffer oversaturated exposure to discussion/speculation/rant/hype/arguments which will end up with fatigue and backlash for me. I will probably keep in touch with the Japanese anime forums and blogs that I frequent though -- and hope that the buzz there would not be too loud and crazy...

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 12:24 pm From between it hitting Japanese theatres and me being able to see it I'll not be going anywhere near anywhere where there might be spoilers. I might still go to the off-topic section of EGF, but a lot of other websites will be off my bookmarks for a few months. It'll suck not being able to watch any Eva videos on youtube for such a long time, though.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 1:29 pm I'll only check to see if Asuka survives. Forgive me for sounding fanboyish.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 22, 2012 1:48 pm Maybe we should put some spoiler policy in place, like, every thread specifically dealing with 3.0 stuff must have "[spoiler]" written in its title, ans in every other thread, 3.0 related stuff must be put in spoiler tags untill the Blu-Rays/DVDs are out in the US.

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Thu Mar 22, 2012 1:58 pm May i ask.......How long did it took for that ugly camrip to come out? at that time i wasn't constantly checking news for eva..... yes indeed i was unconsciously fearing spoilers that might ruin the whole thing. But due to that..... i never knew how much time did it take for that camrip to come out being as it was the only one of it's own, or at least that i knew of.(3-4 months?).

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Mar 22, 2012 2:26 pm I am going to spoil the hell out of myself. I must know dammit. Besides, being spoiled for 2.0 and actually experiencing Anno's mounting insanity were two totally different things, and I can't imagine it won't be doubly so for 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Mar 22, 2012 2:36 pm I hope, of course, that 3.0 will be shown at a film festival in Europe... I would totally go there.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 22, 2012 3:52 pm Kendrix wrote: Maybe we should put some spoiler policy in place, like...

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 4:26 pm Meh, I spoiled the final Harry Potter book for myself, and I still read it. I spoiled EoE for myself, and I still watched it. Even if I spoil EVERYTHING for myself with regards to 3.0, I'll still watch it unless it turns out to be total crap...and if Asuka dies a horrible, senseless death, which I think would be pointless - it would be like saying, "Yeah, you recovered...but we're still gonna fuck you in every orifice."

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 5:40 pm Its funny cause when 2.0 came out, I read a ton of spoilers and when I watched it I was still surprised. Idk maybe I'm more a a visual learner than I am by reading something.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2012 6:54 pm My sentiments fall in line with Seele00's. Avoiding spoilers puts handcuffs on staff members, as well, and Lilith knows this subforum needs as many staffers patrolling it as possible when a new NME move-film comes out... Mr. Tines wrote: The policy will come into effect at the time the first real trailer appears (i.e. 4-6 weeks before the theatrical release)

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Thu Mar 22, 2012 3:50 am I will see it as soon I can, non illegally of course. I
